samples.expectedBehavior: A directly matching prior rejection is recalled with an evidence event id.
Only approved or pinned preference hints are decision eligible.
Expired hints are not decision eligible and can produce stale review candidates.
Candidate dreams and candidate hints do not affect decision output.
Tombstoned raw events invalidate derived indexes, edges, dreams, and hints.
A direct seed can surface a related node through a non-hub graph edge.
High fan-in/fan-out nodes are penalized during activation settlement.
Pure ripple recall is not reinforced by write-back.
